title: Sleeping teddy — battery contacts renewed
description: This bedtime teddy was not powering up consistently. We repaired the battery contacts so the electronic comfort feature works when batteries are fitted.
itemDetails: Sleeping tan teddy with blue pillow is a nursery comfort-plush style, typically sold as bedtime-themed gift merchandise from the 2000s onward. Pillow-attached pose designs are common in baby shower and keepsake teddy ranges. Materials are usually polyester plush and fill, soft pillow fabric, and stitched facial details for safety.
repairDetails: This sleeping tan teddy with blue pillow had intermittent power from corroded battery contacts. We repaired and replaced the battery contacts so the sound or light feature runs reliably again.
